supports: The admitted compiled useful-kernel rows remain exact across transparent source, transparent lowered-trace, internal linear, internal accelerated, and external scalar-reference comparators where applicable.
The current compiled useful-kernel route does not retain bounded value over simpler baselines once compiler and lowering overhead are counted.
does_not_support: a systems-value claim for the compiled useful-kernel route
automatic authorization of a broader compiled useful-family packet
any claim above the preserved H43 bounded useful-case ceiling
